title: e2e: skip pre-checkpoint tests on aarch64
body:
Per Adrian Reber, the aarch64 kernel doesn't support the soft dirty bit and support isn't expected anytime soon.

Ref: https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/criu/issues/2676

comments.body: I'll verify if the tests are skipped correctly on https://github.com/containers/container-selinux/pull/378

> I'll verify if the tests are skipped correctly on [containers/container-selinux#378](https://github.com/containers/container-selinux/pull/378)

This won't work if we need to fetch sources as is the case with e2e test runs. I've verified the tests are skipped on a testing farm aarch64 instance. Opening for review.
